chunks.text: BEARS 2022: Schedule - EECS at Berkeley BEARS 2022: Schedule This event will be held on campus but the presenations from 9:30 AM to 12:40 PM will also be available on Zoom. Monday, April 25, 2022 Time Event 9:35 – 10:10 Welcome Remarks and Presentation of Awards 10:10 – 10:35 Design Automation for Autonomous Intelligent Cyber-Physical Systems – Sanjit Seshia 10:35 – 11 Perceiving Humans in the 3D World – Angjoo Kanazawa short break 11:10 – 11:35 Plastic Dynamism: Delightful Decomposition, Destruction, Decay, Deformation, and Digestive Designs – Eric Paulos 11:35 – 12 Berkeley Robot Open Autonomous Racing (ROAR) : Advancing Vehicle Autonomy for Extreme Scenarios – Allen Yang 12 – 12:25 Expanding Opportunities at Moffett Field – Alexandre Bayen 12:40 pm Lunch on the Woz Terrace View Open Faculty Positions
